info.title: Coline App Platform API
info.summary: Workspace-native app registry, install, and runtime APIs for Coline.
info.description: Canonical OpenAPI source for the current stable app-platform slice. This document covers the public store catalog plus the `/api/v1` workspace install/runtime surface.

tags.name: Store
tags.description: Public store catalog and approved app releases.

tags.name: Publisher
tags.description: Authenticated app registration and version creation APIs.

tags.name: AI
tags.description: Tab API endpoints for completions and model discovery.

tags.name: Workspace installs
tags.description: Workspace app install and permission APIs.

tags.name: Runtime
tags.description: Installed app file, index, notification, and ambient APIs.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook event types and payload schemas.

tab_context.description: Optional. When omitted, context is inferred from the messages array and the API key's workspace.
